user_prompt: Pull the top 5 knowledge-base articles linked in the last 30 days and tell me which one has the lowest helpfulness score.
actual_output:
I can help with that, but I don’t have direct access to your knowledge-base analytics or linked-article data from here.

If you want, I can still help you get this quickly by:

1. Pulling the last 30 days of article-link data from your support system
2. Ranking the top 5 most linked articles
3. Comparing their helpfulness scores
4. Identifying the lowest-scoring one

If you can share an export or the article list with helpfulness scores, I’ll analyze it right away.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot did not refuse the request; it explained a technical limitation regarding real-time data access and provided a clear path forward to fulfill the user's request.
